front.title: Extending SDF and CoAP for AI Agent Interaction with IoT Devices

abstract.t: This document proposes extensions to the Semantic Definition Format (SDF) and the Constrained Application Protocol (CoAP) to better support AI agent interaction with Internet of Things (IoT) devices. It covers two aspects: identifying AI agents in CoAP transactions, and making SDF device descriptions readily consumable by large language models (LLMs) and autonomous agents. The document is intended to stimulate discussion within T2TRG on these topics.
